Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 506}Kirijo-senpai and Yukari have such good figures...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 506}All that exercise in their club activities must really be paying off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 507}That Yamagishi girl has a good figure too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 507}I was surprised when I saw her at the baths yesterday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 507}But she's in a culture club... Maybe clubs have nothing to do with it.[n]{f 1 1}
